description: Simultaneously, Hive confronts the other Kree Reaper in the church. After a philosophical exchange about creation, miracle, and purpose, Hive kills the Kree, taking revenge for centuries of manipulation. The S.H.I.E.L.D. team attempts to attack Hive but quickly learns their weapons are ineffective, forcing a retreat. The S.H.I.E.L.D. team's inability to defeat Hive underscores his seeming invincibility.

transcript.line: I'm no longer the scared hunter you took all those years ago.
Wait! Please. I'm not gonna fight you.
I wanted you to be a part of this.
Big Blue might just have this one.
Don't be so sure. Sounds like Hive's nursing a thousand-year grudge.
You made something great, something divine, and now you want to destroy it.
Sometimes, the world's greatest miracles happen by accident.
Take the shot, now! Repeat! Take the shot!
We have to go! Now! Now!
We could have had a connection that was real.
Daisy, look at yourself. You don't have to do this.
